headers.description: Optional. OAuth 2.1 is the primary auth and is discovered automatically at the endpoint (RFC 9728 — an unauthenticated request returns a 401 with the authorization-server metadata). Alternatively, send a Bearer API key from https://app.johnsessentials.com/integrations?tab=apikeys (format: 'Bearer je_live_sk_...').
headers.name: Authorization
